sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Wrench, Star, ArrowRight, Filter, Search, Clock, MapPin, Users } from 'lucide-react'; const ServicesPage = () => { const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState('all'); const categories = [ { id: 'all', name: '全部服务' }, { id: 'plumbing', name: '管道维修' }, { id: 'electrical', name: '电气维修' }, { id: 'hvac', name: '空调维修' }, { id: 'cleaning', name: '清洁服务' }, { id: 'renovation', name: '装修服务' }, { id: 'maintenance', name: '定期维护' } ]; const services = [ { id: 1, name: '管道维修', category: 'plumbing', description: '专业管道维修服务，包括漏水修复、堵塞疏通、管道更换等', price: '从 RM50 起', duration: '1-3 小时', rating: 4.8, reviews: 156, features: ['24小时紧急服务', '专业工具', '保修服务'], image: '/images/plumbing.jpg' }, { id: 2, name: '电气维修', category: 'electrical', description: '安全可靠的电气维修和安装服务，包括电路检查、开关安装等', price: '从 RM80 起', duration: '2-4 小时', rating: 4.9, reviews: 203, features: ['持证电工', '安全检查', '质量保证'], image: '/images/electrical.jpg' }, { id: 3, name: '空调维修', category: 'hvac', description: '空调清洗、维修和保养服务，确保您的空调高效运行', price: '从 RM120 起', duration: '2-5 小时', rating: 4.7, reviews: 189, features: ['深度清洁', '性能检测', '定期保养'], image: '/images/hvac.jpg' }, { id: 4, name: '清洁服务', category: 'cleaning', description: '专业清洁服务，包括日常清洁、深度清洁、地毯清洗等', price: '从 RM100 起', duration: '3-6 小时', rating: 4.6, reviews: 142, features: ['环保清洁剂', '专业设备', '满意保证'], image: '/images/cleaning.jpg' }, { id: 5, name: '装修服务', category: 'renovation', description: '室内外装修服务，包括墙面翻新、地板安装、厨房改造等', price: '从 RM500 起', duration: '1-7 天', rating: 4.5, reviews: 98, features: ['设计咨询', '材料选择', '施工监督'], image: '/images/renovation.jpg' }, { id: 6, name: '定期维护', category: 'maintenance', description: '定期检查和维护服务，预防性维护确保设备正常运行', price: '从 RM200 起', duration: '2-4 小时', rating: 4.8, reviews: 167, features: ['定期检查', '预防维护', '报告服务'], image: '/images/maintenance.jpg' } ]; const filteredServices = services.filter(service => { const matchesSearch = service.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || service.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()); const matchesCategory = selectedCategory === 'all' || service.category === selectedCategory; return matchesSearch && matchesCategory; }); return (
{/* Header */}

setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" />
{/* Category Filter */}
{/* Services Grid */}

) : (

服务时长: {service.duration}
专业师傅
{/* Features */}
{service.features.map((feature, idx) => ( {feature} ))}

{service.price}
查看详情
))}
)}
{/* CTA Section */}

需要定制服务？

如果您有特殊需求或不在我们标准服务范围内的项目，请联系我们获取定制报价

); }; export default ServicesPage;
